view.title: Validate explicit UC need #11
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for confirming the appointment via SMS is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 11 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for confirming the appointment via SMS is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by confirming that the SMS confirmation message is sent as specified. The evidence includes the scenario where the message "Hi Sarah! Your massage with Mike is confirmed for Thu 2/20 at 3pm. Reply CANCEL to cancel or RESCHEDULE to change." is part of the defined scenarios in the use case. Additionally, the prior steps indicate that the booking status is confirmed, which aligns with the requirement for sending a confirmation message.
